refs.summary: Adds schemaed RuntimeDelegationSnapshot, child summaries, parent playbook step summaries, failed-child feedback, and recovery state derived from persisted runtime records.
Exports the delegation snapshot runtime contract.
Projects delegation snapshot through inspect_thread beside trajectory, policy leases, stop hooks, brain, and runtime substrate.
Existing persisted worker assignment/result/harness session records consumed by the new snapshot.
Existing browser subagent child-session wrapper remains source for managed browser delegation; live artifact polish is Stage 8.
